editorial_position: CampIn should own permission-first, safety-first, own-tent, road-stop, and Bangalore/South India camping answers before launching a booking marketplace.

sources.insight: Recent Bangalore users ask specifically for safe BYOT camping where they can pitch their own tent and avoid crowded commercial camps.
Solo campers ask for safe camping within 150-200 km of Bangalore with no local interference.
Safety around tents and solo travelers is a current Bangalore news topic, including regulatory ambiguity.
Goa caravan policy shows official interest in caravan parks with power, wastewater, freshwater, convenience facilities, and designated overnight parking.
Ministry caravan/campervan guidance supports the road-stop and caravan park content cluster.
CampMonk already has BYOT, caravan stays, safe camps, nature stays, events, and landowner partnership messaging.
HireACamp proves demand for discoverable camping inventory and common amenities such as meals and washrooms.
Exoticamp and similar sites target region-listicle search demand around Bangalore and South India.
Google emphasizes helpful, reliable, people-first content rather than search-engine-first content.
BlogPosting schema should describe article metadata for blog posts.
